title: penstemon elegantulus
intro: Penstemon elegantulus, also known as the elegant beardtongue, is a species of flowering plant in the family Plantaginaceae. It is native to the southwestern United States and is known for its showy, pink or purple flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Penstemon elegantulus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system, and it is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil.
